final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic scroll painting of the Lantern Festival in Tang Dynasty Chang'an, with thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky.

Style/medium: traditional Chinese gongbi zhongcai (meticulous brushwork with heavy colors), handscroll format in the spirit of Qingming Shanghe Tu, ink and mineral pigments on silk
Composition: horizontal bird's-eye view sweeping across the entire cityscape, elevated vantage point revealing streets and architecture in layers
Subject: Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during Lantern Festival, thousands of hanging lanterns in various shapes and sizes, crowds of people in traditional hanfu, palace buildings and pagodas
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese capital city at night, imperial palace in the distance, market streets lined with lantern stalls, willow trees along the river
Lighting/mood: warm golden glow from countless lanterns reflecting on faces and streets, deep indigo night sky as contrast, festive and prosperous atmosphere
Color palette: rich mineral reds and golds from lanterns as dominant warm tones, deep blues and blacks for night sky and shadows, subtle greens for architectural details
Materials/textures: smooth silk surface with visible brushwork, layered mineral pigments creating depth, fine line work defining architectural elements
Avoid: modern electric lighting, anachronistic clothing or objects, photographic realism, Western perspective distortion, plastic textures
